data.job_description:
Acme FinTech is looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our growing payments infrastructure team. You will be responsible for building scalable backend services that process millions of transactions daily.

We are a Series B company with 150 engineers and we are growing the team aggressively as we expand into new markets.

Responsibilities:
- Design and build high-throughput payment processing systems
- Lead technical design reviews
- Mentor junior engineers
- Collaborate with product and design teams

Requirements:
- 5+ years of software engineering experience
- Strong proficiency in Go or Python
- Experience with distributed systems
- AWS experience required (EKS, Lambda, RDS)
- Experience with Kafka or similar message queues
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent

Nice to have:
- Experience in fintech or payments
- Kubernetes expertise
- PostgreSQL at scale

Benefits:
- Competitive salary ($160k-$200k)
- Equity package
- Remote-friendly (Austin HQ)
- Health, dental, vision

Qualifications: Strong proficiency in Go or Python
Responsibilities: Design and build high-throughput payment processing systems

data.job_description:
RetailEdge Systems is a fast-growing retail technology company that helps mid-market retailers compete with big-box stores through better data and automation.

We are looking for a Staff Engineer to lead our platform engineering efforts. This is a high-impact role where you will set the technical direction for our core infrastructure.

You will be working on:
- Building a multi-tenant SaaS platform serving 500+ retailers
- Improving developer experience and internal tooling
- Defining and evolving engineering standards
- Partnering with VPs and directors on roadmap

Required skills:
- 8+ years of software engineering
- Experience with TypeScript/Node.js at scale
- Strong knowledge of cloud infrastructure (AWS preferred)
- Experience with microservices and API design
- Track record of technical leadership

We offer:
- $180k-$230k base
- Meaningful equity
- Fully remote with optional Austin office

Responsibilities: Partner with VPs and directors on roadmap

data.job_description:
TalentBridge Staffing Solutions is looking to place a Software Engineer with one of our Fortune 500 clients. This is a contract-to-hire opportunity with potential for full-time conversion.

Our client is a leading financial services company looking for a strong backend engineer.

Requirements:
- 3+ years of Java or Python experience
- Experience with REST APIs
- Nice to have: Spring Boot

To apply, submit your resume and our recruiting team will be in touch.
